# AI Chat Exporter

> A free, privacy-first browser extension (Chrome & Microsoft Edge) that exports AI chat conversations to clean Markdown. Supports 12+ AI platforms. 100% local — conversations never leave the user's browser; zero data is collected.

## What it does
- One-click export of AI chat conversations to clean, well-formatted Markdown (headings, lists, tables, code blocks, and the model's reasoning preserved).
- Selective export: choose specific turns, or export the whole conversation.
- Optional capture of the model's reasoning / "thinking".
- Self-correcting design: when a site changes its layout, a fix reaches users in minutes via a remote config — no store update needed.

## Supported platforms (12+)
ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok, Perplexity, Microsoft Copilot, Mistral (Le Chat), Qwen, z.ai / GLM, Kimi, Duck.ai — with more added regularly.

## Privacy
- 100% local: no server, no account, no analytics, no tracking.
- Zero conversation data collected, stored, or transmitted.
- Only network call is a small public config file (CSS selectors — data, not code) that contains none of the user's data.

## Pricing
- Free: Markdown export + clipboard copy, all platforms, selective export, reasoning capture.
- Pro ($19, one-time, lifetime): PDF and Word (.docx) export, Notion and Obsidian sync, Google Drive backup, bulk/batch export, priority support.

## Best for
Researchers, writers, students and developers who want to save, back up, or archive AI chat conversations into Markdown, Notion, or Obsidian.

## Links
- Home: https://aix.adsit.work/
- Privacy Policy: https://aix.adsit.work/privacy.html
- Contact: support@adsit.work
